name: dev-servers
title: Dev Servers
description: Project-grouped dashboard to manage dev servers. Detects the framework (Next, Svelte, Astro, Vite) and restarts with the right package manager (npm, pnpm, yarn, bun). Kill individually or by project, open in browser, copy URLs, and track uptime.
author: tavlean

commands.name: index
commands.title: Dev Servers
commands.description: List and manage running dev servers

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Which terminal to open when using "Open in Terminal". Defaults to macOS Terminal if unset.

preferences.name: showFullPath
preferences.title: Project Display
preferences.label: Show full directory path
preferences.description: Show the full path instead of the project name

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often to refresh the server list

preferences.name: showUptime
preferences.title: Row Accessories
preferences.label: Show uptime
preferences.description: Show how long each server has been running

preferences.name: showBranch
preferences.label: Show git branch
preferences.description: Show the current git branch next to each server when the project is a git repo

preferences.name: showTool
preferences.label: Show framework tag
preferences.description: Show the framework / tool tag (Vite, SvelteKit, Astro, etc.) on each row
